name: lpi-digital-twin-agent
description: Agent that queries LPI tools to generate structured answers combining SMILE methodology and healthcare digital twin case studies.

inputs.name: query
inputs.description: User question related to digital twins or SMILE methodology

outputs.name: final_answer
outputs.description: Structured response combining SMILE summary, healthcare case study, and analysis

tools.name: smile_overview
tools.description: Fetches SMILE methodology overview for digital twins

tools.name: get_case_studies
tools.description: Retrieves case studies, filtered for healthcare digital twin applications

execution.description: Executes agent logic, calls LPI Node server, processes and filters results
